info.title: Meticulous API
info.description: REST API for the Meticulous CI/CD platform

post.summary: Admin endpoint to reset a user's password.

parameters.name: window
parameters.description: Only runs created in this window (1h … 7d); default 1d

parameters.name: pipeline_id
parameters.description: Omit for project-wide secret scope; set for pipeline-scoped secrets

parameters.name: pipeline_id
parameters.description: When set, list secrets scoped to this pipeline only

parameters.name: pipeline_id
parameters.description: Filter by pipeline ID (mutually exclusive with `project_id`)

parameters.name: project_id
parameters.description: List runs for all pipelines in this project (mutually exclusive with `pipeline_id`)

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque pagination cursor; for runs this is the row offset as a decimal string (e.g. next page after 20 rows is `cursor=20`)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Items per page (alias: `per_page`; default and max come from API `http.pagination_*` config)

parameters.name: run_number
parameters.description: When set with `pipeline_id`, return the single run with this run number (for compare-to-previous)

200.description: Agent dispatch attempts for this job run

404.description: Run or job run not found

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Row id of the version to make current

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Row id of the version to purge

get.summary: List tokens for the current user.
List enabled auth providers (public endpoint for login page).
Check if initial setup is required.

get.description:
Returns 200 OK if the service is running.
This endpoint is suitable for Kubernetes liveness probes.

Returns 200 OK if all dependencies are healthy.
Returns 503 Service Unavailable if any dependency is unhealthy.
This endpoint is suitable for Kubernetes readiness probes.

last_security_bundle.description: Snapshot of registration-time host / security fields (JSON object).

show_bootstrap_credentials_hint.description: When true, the login UI may show that default bootstrap credentials apply (until changed).

propagate_to_projects.description:
When `scope` is organization: if `false`, secret is **not** visible to pipelines, jobs, or project secret lists
(use for platform SCM such as global workflow catalog import). Default `true`.

scope.description: Set to `"organization"` for org-wide secrets (`project_id` NULL). Requires `org:admin` or `*`.

value.description: One-time plaintext (never stored or returned after this call).

description.description: Optional description of the token's purpose.

project_ids.description: Project IDs this token can access (None = all projects).

CreateTokenResponseBody.description: Create token response (includes the plain token).

plain_token.description: The plain token value (only shown once).

generate_webhook_secret.description: When true and kind is `webhook`, a random secret is generated and returned once in the response.

window.description: Echo of the requested window key (e.g. `1d`).

workflow_path.description: Path to workflow YAML in the repo.

scm_path.description: Path to the pipeline YAML in the repo (e.g. `.stable/demo.yaml`).

agent_snapshot.description: Agent/host audit JSON captured when the job entered `running` (investigation / compromise lineage).

pipeline_definition_sha256.description: SHA-256 (hex) of the pipeline definition JSON snapshot used for this run (see `definition_snapshots`).

scheduling_note.description: Best-effort explanation when a job is pending or queued (omitted when not applicable).

workflow_definition_sha256.description: SHA-256 (hex) of the reusable workflow definition when this job came from one.

pipeline_definition.description: Pipeline definition JSON for this job run (from `definition_snapshots`), if recorded.

workflow_definition.description: Reusable workflow definition JSON for this job run, if recorded.

password_must_change.description: When true, the client must complete a password change before using the rest of the API.

count.description: Number of items in this response.

next_cursor.description: Cursor for the next page (null if no more pages).

ProjectWorkflowsAvailableResponse.description: Workflows visible when authoring pipelines in a project: org **global** (execution-gated) plus **project**-scoped rows.

PublicAuthProvider.description: Public auth provider info (for login page).

parent_run_number.description: Run number of `parent_run_id` when set (for display without a second fetch).

pipeline_name.description: Present when listing runs by `project_id` (all pipelines in a project).

status_display.description: When set, UIs should prefer this over `run.status` for the primary badge (e.g. run is `running` but no job has reached agent execution yet).

job_name.description: Job that produced the SBOM artifact (from `artifacts.job_run_id`).

step_name.description: Best-effort step hint from artifact `metadata` (`step_name` or `step`).

propagate_to_projects.description: Org-wide only: when `false`, not exposed to pipelines or project secret UIs (catalog SCM may still use).

git_ref.description: When set, sync from this ref instead of the pipeline's stored `scm_ref`.

config.description: Webhook configuration without `secret`; use `secret_configured` to see if HMAC is required.

generated_secret.description: Present only on create when `generate_webhook_secret` was true.

allow_untrusted_workflows.description: When false, untrusted global catalog workflows cannot be executed.

config_patch.description: Merged into existing JSON config (objects merge recursively).

UserResponse.description: User response body (sanitized, no password hash).

WorkflowDiagnosticItem.description: One workflow reference from the pipeline and how it resolves against the org catalog / DB.

blocking.description: When true, pipeline execution should be blocked until resolved.

declared_outputs.description: Declared workflow output names from the resolved catalog/project definition (`outputs:` + step `outputs:`), when parseable.

invocation_id.description: Invocation id from the pipeline YAML (`workflows[].id`).

tags.name: stored_secrets
tags.description: Platform-stored encrypted secrets (metadata only on read)
